evidence_text: Mo addition progressively increased carbon yield and significantly enhanced graphitic carbon selectivity.
evidence_summary: Mo promotes carbon diffusion/graphitization through carbide-related Fe-Mo interactions.

evidence_text: the dominant CNT structure shifts from single- and double-walled to multi-walled
evidence_summary: Increasing Mo coarsened particles and shifted SW/DW products toward MWCNTs.
